connection_type.description: Choose whether to connect to a Weaviate Cloud instance or a custom Weaviate instance.

weaviate_cloud_endpoint.description: The Endpoint of a Weaviate Cloud instance.

weaviate_api_key.description: The API key for the Weaviate instance.

custom_connection_http_host.description: The host of your Weaviate instance.

custom_connection_http_port.description: The port of your Weaviate instance.

custom_connection_http_secure.description: Whether to use a secure connection for HTTP.

custom_connection_grpc_host.description: The gRPC host of your Weaviate instance.

custom_connection_grpc_port.description: The gRPC port of your Weaviate instance.

custom_connection_grpc_secure.description: Whether to use a secure connection for gRPC.
